commands.repair_reason: No automated repair lane is needed because the PR has no actionable code defect, has supplied real behavior proof, and only needs normal maintainer review or merge handling.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff only changes Gateway path parsing and focused tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, permission, package-resolution, or code-execution surface changes. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Gateway session-kill HTTP path parser to distinguish unmatched paths from invalid matched session keys and adds tests for malformed and decoded-empty session keys.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows `/sessions/%zz/kill` matches the session-kill route shape, `decodeURIComponent()` fails, and the handler returns unhandled; the PR body also supplies before/after real Gateway output for the same path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair lane is needed because the PR has no actionable code defect, has supplied real behavior proof, and only needs normal maintainer review or merge handling.
